name: nick-personal-marketplace
description: Nick's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace featuring OMT and other productivity tools

plugins.name: omt
plugins.description: OMT - One Man Team: Your personal development squad powered by Agent-First workflow with 5 autonomous agents

plugins.name: readability
plugins.description: Readability Formatting: Enhances AI-generated text readability through proper alignment and formatting of markdown tables, ASCII art, and text-based diagrams

plugins.name: thinking
plugins.description: Thinking frameworks for better decision-making: scenario-driven design, dimensional analysis, and explicit trade-offs

plugins.name: mermaid-viz
plugins.description: Mermaid Visualization: Display Mermaid diagrams as high-quality PNG/SVG images with 8 beautiful color schemes - flowcharts, sequence diagrams, and more

plugins.name: doc-viz
plugins.description: Document Visualizer: Render any markdown as formatted HTML with syntax highlighting, Mermaid diagrams, KaTeX math, and animations

plugins.name: jj
plugins.description: Jujutsu (jj) VCS helper: workflow commands, natural language operations, and Git-to-jj translation
